[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image appears to be a split-screen view with a detailed black-and-white illustration on the left and a blurred, out-of-focus close-up of a face on the right.

Main Subject:
On the left, the main focus is a black-and-white illustrated face shown in close-up, with prominent linework and heavy shading around the eye area and mouth. On the right, the main focus is a blurred close-up of a face, with indistinct features.

Setting:
The left side looks like a stylized drawing on a plain background with high-contrast shading; the right side looks like a photographic or video capture with a shallow depth of field, but the specific setting is unclear.

Visual Details:
Left panel: The illustrated head is turned slightly, filling most of the frame. A large, circular dark shape appears near the upper left area of the face, surrounded by dense ink-like lines. The eye area includes thick outlines and crosshatching; the mouth is drawn with visible teeth and a small cluster of dark strokes near the lips. The background is mostly white with scattered black marks and fine texture resembling ink hatching. Right panel: The image is strongly blurred, showing a human-like face close to the camera; there are darker patches around where the eyes would be and a darker opening near the center-bottom area, with the rest blending into light and medium gray tones. The camera angle on the left is a tight close-up; on the right it is also close-up but blurred, making exact orientation unclear.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The left half shows a high-contrast black-and-white illustrated close-up face with heavy linework and shading. The right half shows a heavily blurred close-up face with indistinct facial features.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text detected in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None visible

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain an illustration/image, but no readable UI text, captions, or characters are visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
